scripts.preinstall: node -e "const fs=require('fs'); for (const f of ['package-lock.json','yarn.lock']) fs.rmSync(f,{force:true}); const ua=String(process.env.npm_config_user_agent||''); const exec=String(process.env.npm_execpath||process.env.PNPM_HOME||''); if (!ua.startsWith('pnpm/') && !exec.toLowerCase().includes('pnpm')) { console.error('Use pnpm instead'); process.exit(1); }"
scripts.build: pnpm run typecheck && pnpm -r --if-present run build
scripts.typecheck: pnpm run typecheck:libs && pnpm -r --filter "./artifacts/**" --filter "./scripts" --if-present run typecheck
